title: Newspaper Articles about Hossa National Park and Evo Hiking Area: List of Works 2012-2023
description: The material includes a list of newspaper articles, which contains information on the Hossa National Park and the Evo Hiking Area. The list of articles contains the chronologically ordered reference data: the code by which the article is referred to in the research, the name of the author of the article, the title of the article, the title of the publication, the date of the publication, the page number of the article, the type of text (editorial, news, column), the ISSN of the publication, the
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
